narrative:
Lima City has 18,267 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
